title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 275.140 - Number of shares may be limited
text:
275.140.  Number of shares may be limited. — Associations organized under the provisions of this chapter shall have power, and they are hereby authorized, to limit the number of shares which any stockholder or member of such association may have or hold.
(RSMo 1939 § 14373) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 12715
